pageContext.name: Lord Shaxx
pageContext.description: Charismatic Crucible Handler and former Warlord, Lord Shaxx commands an audience with ease. With his booming presence, unwavering conviction, and reputation as a ferocious warrior, it's no wonder he's beloved among Destiny fans. We're proud to pay tribute to his brazen character with this epic statue!  This figure is made from PVC and ABS and stands almost 12 inches tall. The base is designed with a Crucible-styled theme to match Lord Shaxx's favorite pastime. Did he remind you about the grenades yet? You really should throw more grenades. You should be throwing grenades as you read this.  Add to your collection today!
